game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **常夏プールパレス**: Players manage a tropical pool resort on a grid-based map, tapping to select and place various facilities like pools, waterslides, restaurants, and decorations from a build menu. The core loop involves earning money from customer usage, which is then reinvested into expanding the resort and upgrading facilities to increase their appeal and capacity. Customer satisfaction, represented by a numerical rating (0-100), is improved by fulfilling specific customer requests and offering diverse attractions, leading to increased "SNS buzz" points that attract more visitors and unlock new customer types. Progression involves unlocking new building types, recipes, and decorative items through research points earned over time or by achieving specific resort popularity milestones. Difficulty scales as the resort expands, demanding more strategic layouts and resource management to maintain high customer flow and profitability.
game_info.description: Welcome to 常夏プールパレス (Tropical Pool Palace)! Build and manage your dream tropical pool resort. Place facilities like pools, slides, and restaurants on your grid-based resort map to attract customers and earn money. Keep customer satisfaction high by offering diverse attractions and fulfilling their needs. Earn SNS buzz points to unlock new buildings and grow your resort. Balance your budget, expand strategically, and create the ultimate vacation destination!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate/select facilities in build menu
Space: Place selected facility on the grid
Z: Toggle build menu on/off
Shift: Speed up time (hold)
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic game mechanics including menu navigation, facility placement, and customer generation. Validates that the game initializes properly, players can select facilities, place them on the grid, and that customers spawn and interact with facilities. This ensures core gameplay loop functionality.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Opens build menu, navigates through available facilities, places a pool and a restaurant in strategic locations. Waits for customers to spawn and interact with placed facilities. Monitors money generation and customer satisfaction to ensure systems are working.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully places multiple facilities, customers spawn and visit them, money increases over time, and customer satisfaction remains stable. The test validates core placement and economic systems are functional without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal win strategy by efficiently building a profitable resort that maximizes customer satisfaction and SNS buzz. Aims to reach the win condition by strategically placing facilities, managing resources, and maintaining high customer flow. Tests progression system and unlock mechanics.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Starts by placing high-value facilities like pools and waterslides in efficient patterns. Adds restaurants near attractions to fulfill customer needs. Manages budget carefully, reinvesting profits into new facilities. Focuses on maintaining 90+ satisfaction and accumulating 1000+ SNS buzz points to win.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state by reaching 1000 SNS buzz points while maintaining high customer satisfaction. Resort expands progressively with diverse facilities. Money management is efficient, and the win condition is reached within reasonable time demonstrating optimal strategy.
